---
title: "Group Members"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: pis
    contents: "members/pis/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  
  - id: postdocs
    contents: "members/postdocs/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: phds
    contents: "members/phds/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    
  - id: interns
    contents: "members/interns/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    
  - id: alumni
    contents: "members/alumnis/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

:::: {style='margin-top: 3em;'}
## Principal Investigators (PIs)
:::{#pis}
:::

## Postdoctoral Researchers
:::{#postdocs}
:::

## PhD Students
:::{#phds}
:::

## Interns
:::{#interns}
:::
::::

## Alumni
:::{#alumnis}
:::
